en.subTitle: When you listen to music most — last {days} days
en.warningDesc: Since this app is a local Spicetify extension, it only tracks songs while the Spotify Desktop app is open on this computer. If you listen to music on your phone, it WILL be tracked as long as Spotify Desktop is running (via Spotify Connect sync). Plays that happen when Spotify Desktop is closed cannot be recorded.
en.antiSkipDesc: To keep your heatmap accurate and fair, a song is only recorded after listening for at least 20 seconds (or half the song length for very short tracks). Rapidly skipping through songs will not be registered as play events.
en.dataStoredLocally: Data is stored locally in your browser — never sent anywhere.
en.resetModalDesc: This will delete all logged play events and skipped tracks. This action cannot be undone.
en.noDataTitle: No data yet — listen to some music first!
en.noDataDesc: Play some music, and data will appear automatically.

morning.title: Early Bird
morning.desc: You start your mornings with fresh rhythms.

afternoon.title: Daydreamer
afternoon.desc: Music carries you through the daily rush.

evening.title: Sunset Lover
evening.desc: You wind down your day with soothing vibes.

night.title: Night Owl
night.desc: The night is young, and so is your playlist.

gloomy.name: Gloomy / Melancholy
gloomy.desc: Slow, emotional tracks dominate. Perfect for deep thoughts or nostalgic moments.

soulful.name: Acoustic / Soulful
soulful.desc: Heavy acoustic and gentle tracks. Sounds intimate and deeply comforting.

chill.name: Chill / Relaxed
chill.desc: Smooth, low-intensity tunes are keeping you calm. Perfect for studying or unwinding.

cheerful.name: Energetic & Cheerful
cheerful.desc: Up-beat, high-energy tracks are boosting your vibe. Perfect for active tasks.

intense.name: Intense & Heavy
intense.desc: High energy with darker, heavier tones. Great for raw focus and adrenaline.

balanced.name: Balanced / Diverse
balanced.desc: A balanced mix of different feelings and vibes. Adaptive to any situation.

id.subTitle: Kapan lo paling sering dengerin musik — {days} hari terakhir
id.activeTimeDesc: Lo paling sering dengerin musik waktu {time}.
id.warningDesc: Karena aplikasi ini adalah ekstensi lokal Spicetify, data lagu hanya tercatat jika Spotify Desktop di PC ini sedang aktif berjalan. Jika lo memutar lagu di HP, pemutaran TETAP ter-track selama Spotify Desktop di PC dalam keadaan terbuka (melalui sinkronisasi Spotify Connect). Lagu yang diputar saat Spotify Desktop ditutup tidak bisa terekam.
id.antiSkipDesc: Supaya heatmap lebih adil dan akurat, lagu baru akan tercatat jika lo dengerin minimal selama 20 detik (atau setengah durasi lagu untuk track yang sangat pendek). Kalau cuma skip-skip cepat, lagu tersebut nggak bakal masuk hitungan.
id.dataStoredLocally: Data disimpan lokal di browser lo — tidak dikirim ke mana pun.
id.resetModalDesc: Ini bakal ngehapus semua riwayat putar dan lagu yang di-skip. Tindakan ini tidak bisa dibatalkan.
id.noDataTitle: Belum ada data — yuk dengerin musik dulu!
id.noDataDesc: Dengerin musik dulu, data bakal muncul otomatis.

morning.title: Pagi Produktif
morning.desc: Lo memulai pagi hari dengan ketukan segar.

afternoon.title: Siang Ceria
afternoon.desc: Musik nemenin lo melewati rutinitas siang hari.

evening.title: Sunset Lover
evening.desc: Lo menutup hari dengan alunan yang santai.

night.title: Burung Hantu
night.desc: Malam masih muda, playlist lo juga masih asyik.

gloomy.name: Galau / Sendu
gloomy.desc: Lagu-lagu sendu mendominasi. Cocok buat nemenin ngelamun atau bernostalgia.

soulful.name: Syahdu / Intim
soulful.desc: Didominasi alunan akustik dan vokal hangat. Terasa intim dan menenangkan jiwa.

chill.name: Santai / Rileks
chill.desc: Lagu dengan tempo sedang dan vibes adem. Enak buat nemenin belajar atau santai.

cheerful.name: Ceria / Bersemangat
cheerful.desc: Banyak lagu up-beat dan ceria. Bikin mood naik dan pengen ikutan joget!

intense.name: Intens / Keras
intense.desc: Lagu berenergi tinggi dengan nuansa gelap atau cadas. Cocok buat naikin adrenalin.

balanced.name: Dinamis / Berwarna
balanced.desc: Perpaduan berbagai mood yang seimbang. Menyesuaikan segala situasi.
